prose:
The fukui-reactivity task on aniline was performed using the chemkit tool with DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1.

The most electrophilic site is Carbon (atom 3) with a Fukui f+ value of 2.2975867.
The most nucleophilic site is Nitrogen (atom 1) with a Fukui f- value of 0.20452359.

The calculation integrity is trustworthy.
The following warnings were reported: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge), sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge), common header present.
